title: The Golden Bat
writer: Takeo Nagamatsu, Ichiro Suzuki, Susumu Takaku
actors: Shin'ichi Chiba, Osamu Kobayashi, Wataru Yamagawa
plot: When the Earth is threatened by an evil alien, a group of UN scientists travel to the lost city of Atlantis where they unearth a superhuman mummy named The Golden Bat who is prophesied to help the humans survive this terrible attack.
